name: Update GC balance when making multiple payments using 2 GCs

steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "8526"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('8', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('5', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('2', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('6', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Hung" in the employee list
When I add the "Pedicure" service to my cart
Then I should see my cart showing 1 item added
When I click on the total price of "Pedicure"
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
When I select the "Gift" payment type
Then I should see the "ID GIFT CARD" name
When I fill the Gift card with "0157"
And I click on the "CHECK BALANCE" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'CHECK BALANCE', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'CHECK BALANCE', exact: true })
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see the payment history "Gift (0157)" visible
And I should see the payment price "$10.00"
When I select the "Gift" payment type
And I fill the Gift card with "0158"
And I click on the "CHECK BALANCE" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'CHECK BALANCE', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'CHECK BALANCE', exact: true })
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the GIFT_CARD_BALANCE page
Then I should see the first date is today in the gift card detail list
And I should see the first type "Redeem" in the gift card detail list
And I should see the first amount "($10.00)" in the gift card detail list
When I click on the "SEARCH ANOTHER" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'SEARCH ANOTHER', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'SEARCH ANOTHER', exact: true })
Then I should see the first date is today in the gift card detail list
And I should see the first type "Redeem" in the gift card detail list
And I should see the first amount "($35.80)" in the gift card detail list
When I clock out the timesheet with PIN "8526"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('8', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('5', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('2', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('6', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
